message:
fix(missions): align kubara info tooltip button on same row as root node (#9432)

showHeaderActions was missing the infoTooltip condition, so the wrapper
div was not flex when only an infoTooltip was present, causing the ⓘ
button to render on the next line instead of inline with the node label.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
